full_text:
Princess of Jinxiang 金鄉公主曹氏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Princess of Jinxiang (金鄉公主曹氏). Daughter of Cao Cao, wife of He Yan. Princess of Jinxiang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
